svg.title: PIM-AI FastAPI Modular Monolith — recommended system architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram with 5 tiers: API layer, shared foundation, agent modules, background tasks, and external services all within one FastAPI service

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FastAPI agent routers for PIM-AI')
sendPrompt('How should the HITL framework work in PIM-AI?')
sendPrompt('How should the MCP server be set up for PIM-AI agents?')

sendPrompt('How should audit logging work for PIM-AI agent actions?')
sendPrompt('Which vector database should PIM-AI use — pgvector, Pinecone, or Weaviate?')
sendPrompt('Go deep on the Catalog Management Agent tasks C-01 to C-16')
sendPrompt('Go deep on the Content and Enrichment Agent tasks E-01 to E-15')
sendPrompt('Go deep on the Procurement Agent tasks P-01 to P-17')

sendPrompt('What scheduled workflows run in PIM-AI and at what cadence?')
g.text: C-10 · C-11 · E-11 · P-11 patrol + onboarding
